name: aria-remote
description: Resolves the aria-vm remote authority: boots Aria's built-in VM and connects the window to the aria-reh extension host running inside it, so extensions/CLIs/MCP run in the VM while the UI stays on the host.

commands.title: Aria: Open Current Project in the VM

aria.remote.shareFolder.description: Host folder shared into the VM at /home/aria/project via rclone sftp + sshfs. Set per project when opening it in the VM.

aria.remote.rclonePath.description: Path to the rclone binary used for the host→guest file share. Falls back to the ARIA_RCLONE_PATH env var.

aria.remote.vm.cpus.description: vCPUs for the built-in VM (clamped to this machine's core count).

aria.remote.vm.memoryMB.description: Guest RAM in MB for the built-in VM (clamped below physical RAM).

aria.remote.vm.diskGB.description: Max virtual disk in GB for the built-in VM (sparse).
